global_description: A medium-sized songbird with a stout body and a short, thick conical bill. The male is predominantly deep blue with a slightly lighter blue on the wings and tail, while the female is mostly brown with subtle blue tinges. Both have a smooth, glossy feather texture.
discriminative_attributes: Brown plumage with blue tinges in females

part_details.wings: Medium length, deep blue in males, brown with blue tinges in females
part_details.tail: Short, slightly forked, deep blue in males
part_details.body: Stout, deep blue in males, brown in females
part_details.head: Rounded, deep blue in males, brown in females

spatial_relations: The wings are attached to the sides of the body
The tail extends from the rear of the body
The bill is positioned at the front of the head
